ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_tags" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversion */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversion-tag relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversion-tag relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
column_names: Timestamp when the tag was created
Timestamp when the tag was last updated
Timestamp when the conversion-tag relationship was created
Timestamp when the conversion-tag relationship was last updated
